docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,271.00 FILED BY SLESINGER, CHARLES AS TO DEFENDANT AIRBNB ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-23-2022 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM (SMALL CLAIMS) FILED BY DEFENDANT AIRBNB
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $40) SERVED JAN-27-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT AIRBNB
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM (SMALL CLAIMS) (REQUEST FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE.) FILED BY DEFENDANT AIRBNB
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00) 2ND PROOF OF SERVICE FOR AIRBNB FILED SERVED JAN-21-2022, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT AIRBNB
ORDER ON DEFENDANT'S (AIRBNB)REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED. (HEARING SET FOR FEB-23-22 AT 8:30AM)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-23-2022 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-23-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-23-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF CHARLES SLESINGER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT AIRBNB IS PRESENT IS REPRESENTED BY MONIQUE CHAUVET, LEGAL INVESTIGATIONS ASSOCIATES. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SLESINGER, CHARLES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AIRBNB $5,271.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,386.00, THE FIRST OMICRON CASE WAS REPORTED IN THE US ON DECEMBER 1, 2021. GOVERNOR NEWSOM IMPOSED THE STATEWIDE MASK MANDATE FROM DECEMBER 15, 2021 UNTIL JANUARY 15, 2022. *MOREOVER, THE US DESIGNATED OMICRON AS A VARIANT OF CONCERN ON NOVEMBER 30, 2021. THEREFORE, PLAINTIFF'S RESERVATION FALLS WITHIN AIRBNB'S DEFINITION OF AN EXTENUATING CIRCUMSTANCE BECAUSE OMICRON WAS UNFORESEEN AT THE TIME PLAINTIFF MADE THE RESERVATION. *SEE CDC.GOV/CORONAVIRUS/2019 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SC-109 - AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR (DARIEN SHEPHERD TO APPEAR ON BEHALF OF AIRBNB, INC.) FILED BY DEFENDANT AIRBNB
(SC-109) AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR MONIQUE CHAUVET TO APPEAR ON BEHALF OF AIRBNB FILED BY DEFENDANT AIRBNB
